mapper.sql: id, chapter_no, article_id, chapter_title, chapter_content, core_plot, word_count_estimate, chapter_voice_link, chapter_video_link, generation_status, story_complete, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM article_chapter WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article_chapter WHERE article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY chapter_no ASC

SELECT
FROM article_chapter WHERE (chapter_content IS NULL OR chapter_content = '') AND core_plot IS NOT NULL AND word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY article_id ASC, chapter_no ASC

SELECT
FROM article_chapter WHERE article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND (chapter_content IS NULL OR chapter_content = '') AND core_plot IS NOT NULL AND word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY chapter_no ASC

SELECT ac.* FROM article_chapter ac INNER JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id WHERE (ac.chapter_content IS NULL OR ac.chapter_content = '') AND ac.core_plot IS NOT NULL AND ac.word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND ac.res_state = 1 AND a.generation_status != 1 -- 排除生成中的文章 ORDER BY ac.article_id ASC, ac.chapter_no ASC

SELECT
FROM article_chapter WHERE res_state = 1 AND generation_status = #{generationStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT} ORDER BY article_id ASC, chapter_no ASC
